title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: July 20, 2023
summary: July 20 2023: Over the past week, the sea ice had a decrease , since last week, by a higher rate of 9.76% , from the level on 07/13/2023 of 8.466 M km 2 to 7.640 M km 2 for this week.
